nasb.text: Since that time no prophet has risen in Israel like Moses, whom the Lord knew face to face,

esv.text: And there has not arisen a prophet since in Israel like Moses, whom the Lord knew face to face,

cnv.text: 以後在以色列中，再沒有興起一位先知像摩西一樣的；他是耶和華面對面所認識的。

ccb.text: 此后，以色列再也没有出现像摩西那样的先知，他曾面见耶和华，
